title: WASH & WORSHIP - 211info
text: ROLLING HILLS COMMUNITY CHURCH WASH & WORSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hot breakfast, showers, and access to laundry services. 3550 SW Borland Road Tualatin, OR 97062 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Sunday 8:30am-10:30am Email (503) 683-5900 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (503) 683-5900 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Community resources are located on the lower level, east (left) side of the building. Services: Community Meals Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOPE'S TABLE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF RELEASE MUTUAL SUPPORT - CELEBRATE RECOVERY MUTUAL SUPPORT - DIVORCE CARE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - POP IN PLAY DATE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
